summary: Tech debt cleanup - provider_id standardization testing complete. All 15 backend tests passed. The provider_id/provider_type field naming is working correctly across all affected endpoints (Doula/Midwife dashboards, clients, invoices, contracts, contract templates, notes).
critical_code_review_comments: client_utils.py: get_active_clients_query() still uses 'pro_user_id' in base_query but this function is NOT used in server.py - it's dead code. Consider updating or removing.
client_utils.py: build_provider_query() maps clients/invoices/contracts to 'pro_user_id' but server.py actually uses 'provider_id' for these collections now. This helper is also dead code.
Migration script correctly adds provider_id to existing documents while preserving pro_user_id for backward compatibility
All active query code in server.py uses provider_id consistently
seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix (TEST_ProviderID_Client, TEST_Midwife_ProviderID). Note: No DELETE endpoint exists for clients, so test data persists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: provider_id standardization complete. All endpoints use provider_id/provider_type fields. The migration script added these fields to existing documents while preserving old pro_user_id/pro_type fields for backward compatibility. client_utils.py has some dead code that references the old field names but is not used by server.py.

doula_dashboard.evidence: GET /api/doula/dashboard returns 200 with correct dashboard data using provider_id queries

midwife_dashboard.evidence: GET /api/midwife/dashboard returns 200 with correct dashboard data using provider_id queries

doula_clients.evidence: GET /api/doula/clients returns clients with provider_id and provider_type fields

midwife_clients.evidence: GET /api/midwife/clients returns clients with provider_id and provider_type fields

client_creation.evidence: POST /api/{doula|midwife}/clients creates clients with provider_id and provider_type

client_details.evidence: GET /api/{doula|midwife}/clients/{id} returns nested client object with provider_id

invoices.evidence: GET /api/{doula|midwife}/invoices returns invoices with provider_id and provider_type

contract_templates.evidence: GET /api/contract-templates returns templates with provider_id field

notes.evidence: GET /api/doula/notes returns notes with provider_id field

backend_tests_summary.TestDoulaEndpointsAfterStandardization: 3/3 PASSED - dashboard, clients list, client create
backend_tests_summary.TestMidwifeEndpointsAfterStandardization: 3/3 PASSED - dashboard, clients list, client create
backend_tests_summary.TestProviderIdHelperFunctions: 2/2 PASSED - doula client details, midwife client details
